caption: A man with a distinct, tall, silver-grey beehive hairstyle and glasses sits in a podcast studio. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red and gold bowtie, and tan suspenders, with black over-ear headphones on. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone. The background consists of a wall filled with numerous framed photographs and some clothing displays, including a mannequin wearing a black garment. In the lower left, a logo reads "THE STALID PODCAST," and in the lower right, red and white text says "BOSS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains mostly stationary, staring ahead with a neutral expression, while slightly shifting his gaze and subtly moving his head. The setting and equipment remain constant across the frames, capturing a still, expectant moment during a recording session.
